isolation.type: Rust unit tests on host machine
isolation.sharedState: None — each test creates its own mock transport

steps.expected: Two Droid JSON-RPC calls: droid.initialize_session (with model, autonomy, working_dir) then droid.add_user_message with extracted text; result has thread ID
steps.observed: Test passed. Captured requests confirm initialize_session with correct params (model=claude-sonnet-4-20250514, autonomyLevel=normal, workingDirectory=/home/user/project), then add_user_message with content='Hello Droid!'. Result contains id starting with 'droid-thread-'.

steps.expected: Only initialize_session called (no add_user_message when no text)
steps.observed: Test passed. Exactly 1 request sent: droid.initialize_session. No add_user_message.

steps.expected: Text extracted from 'content' field and passed to add_user_message
steps.observed: Test passed. add_user_message called with content='Direct content text'.

steps.expected: Text extracted from 'text' field and passed to add_user_message
steps.observed: Test passed. add_user_message called with content='Text field content'.

steps.expected: Only add_user_message called (no initialize_session); text extracted from items array
steps.observed: Test passed. Exactly 1 request: droid.add_user_message with content='Follow-up question'. No initialize_session sent. Result is null (no synthetic thread ID).

steps.expected: Text extracted from 'content' field for turn/start
steps.observed: Test passed. add_user_message called with content='Direct content'.
Test passed. Request droid.cancel sent. Result is null.

steps.expected: Cancel on idle succeeds without error
steps.observed: Test passed. Result is Ok — cancel on idle is a no-op.

assertions.title: thread/list maps to droid list_sessions with format conversion

steps.expected: list_sessions called, response converted to Codex ThreadList format with threads array
steps.observed: Test passed. Response contains threads array with 2 entries, each with id, title. Correctly mapped from Droid session format.

steps.expected: When list_sessions returns -32601, gracefully falls back to empty list
Empty sessions list returns empty threads array
steps.observed: Test passed. Returns {"threads": []} when no sessions.

steps.expected: Returns {"ok": true} without sending Droid command
Returns {"ok": true} without sending Droid command
Returns {"ok": true} without sending Droid command
No Droid JSON-RPC output for all three no-op methods
steps.observed: Test passed. Captured output string is empty — no Droid commands were sent.

evidence.testOutput: All 4 tests passed: droid_codex_thread_archive_is_noop, droid_codex_thread_rollback_is_noop, droid_codex_thread_name_set_is_noop, droid_codex_noop_methods_do_not_send_droid_commands

steps.expected: Returns RpcError::Server with code -32601 and message containing method name
steps.observed: Test passed. Error is RpcError::Server { code: -32601, message containing 'nonexistent/method' }.

summary: Tested 7 assertions (17 tests total): all passed. Droid native method mapping is fully implemented and verified. thread/start correctly chains initialize_session + add_user_message, turn/start maps to add_user_message only, turn/interrupt maps to cancel, thread/list converts from list_sessions with -32601 fallback, no-op methods return success without Droid commands, collaborationMode/list returns empty, and unknown methods return -32601 error.
